Global (All).summary: Global protests and demonstrations turn violent, affecting major cities worldwide.
Major cyberattack on global supply chain disrupts operations in key industries.
Global economic instability triggered by sudden interest rate hikes, causing market volatility.

United States.title: US Supreme Court Blocks Biden's Student Loan Forgiveness Plan
United States.summary: The US Supreme Court halts President Biden's student loan forgiveness plan, leaving millions of borrowers uncertain about their debt relief prospects.

United States.title: US Senate Passes $45 Billion for Ukraine and Other International Aid
United States.summary: The US Senate votes to provide $45 billion in assistance to Ukraine and other countries, amidst ongoing tensions between Russia and the West.

United States.title: Mass Shootings in the US: A Growing Concern
United States.summary: Four mass shootings in the US within a week have left several people dead and many more injured, sparking renewed calls for stricter gun control laws.

South Korea.title: North Korea's Kim Jong-un orders missile test after Seoul's arms exports to Ukraine
South Korea.summary: North Korean leader Kim Jong-un ordered a missile test in response to South Korea's arms exports to Ukraine, escalating tensions between Pyongyang and Seoul.

South Korea.title: South Korea's opposition urges president to revise budget amid inflation concerns
South Korea.summary: South Korea's opposition leader called for President Yoon Suk-yeol to revise the 2024 budget to address rising inflation concerns, increasing political tensions in the country.

South Korea.title: South Korea's central bank raises key interest rate by 25 basis points to combat inflation
South Korea.summary: The Bank of Korea raised its benchmark interest rate by 25 basis points to 3.5% in an effort to curb inflation and stabilize the economy, with some market analysts predicting further rate hikes.

Japan.title: Magnitude 6.0 earthquake hits eastern part of Japan
Japan.summary: A 6.0-magnitude earthquake struck the eastern coast of Japan, prompting a tsunami warning. No casualties or significant damage have been reported so far.

Japan.title: Protest Against Japanese Government's Economic Policy Held in Tokyo
Japan.summary: A group of protesters gathered in Tokyo to demonstrate against the Japanese government's economic policies, which they say are exacerbating income inequality and economic stagnation.

Japan.title: Japanese Government Raises COVID-19 Alert Level in Tokyo
Japan.summary: The Japanese government has raised the COVID-19 alert level in Tokyo due to a recent surge in cases, urging residents to take precautions and wear masks in public.
